positive: A whimsical, highly detailed circular emblem design featuring a stylized pairing of a soaring golden retriever silhouette and a massive, bioluminescent fern frond. The style should be a modern, clean graphic illustration with heavy line work and flat color blocking, reminiscent of mid-century modern poster art merged with Japanese woodblock prints. Use a limited, earthy color palette (deep forest greens, burnt orange, sky blue, and gold accents) against a solid, contrasting background color. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, making the subject matter immediately readable and suitable for repeating apparel prints. Emphasize clean silhouettes and strong graphical contrast.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, brand, blurry, fuzzy, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, photographic, realism, gradient, messy, distracting elements
